question.question_text: How many total points will be scored in the NBA game between New Orleans Pelicans and Toronto Raptors on 2026-03-27?
question.context: New Orleans Pelicans (25-48) at Toronto Raptors (40-32). Regular season NBA game.

prediction.reasoning: NBA games in the 2025-26 season average around 225-230 total points. The Pelicans are a below-average offensive team (25-48 record suggests struggles), while the Raptors are a middling team at 40-32. Toronto playing at home typically has a slight pace advantage. Both teams are neither extreme pace leaders nor laggards. The Pelicans' poor record may suggest weaker offense/defense metrics. Recent NBA pace trends put average totals near 226-230. I estimate 228 as a reasonable point estimate, with typical game-to-game variance of roughly ±15-20 points covering most outcomes.
